summary: Tested video consultation Pro feature: backend endpoints (video-join, video-status, video-leave), CustomerDashboard 'Video beitreten' button + VideoCallModal, StudioPage 3-option booking type layout.
critical_code_review_comments: All video consultation features implemented and working correctly.
VideoCallModal polls participants every 3s and calls video-leave on unmount - correct cleanup.
isPast check on CustomerDashboard correctly hides 'Video beitreten' for past bookings.

success_rate.backend: 100% (4/4 passed, 1 skipped - no non-video booking available)

seed_data_creation: Used existing confirmed video_consultation booking book_5bb7ea0a1b5a
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video consultation feature fully tested at iteration 21. Backend: video-join returns {joined:true, room_id:'inkbook-{id}'}, video-status returns {participants:[], booking_type:'video_consultation'}, video-leave removes participant. Frontend: CustomerDashboard shows 'Video beitreten' button for confirmed future video bookings; VideoCallModal opens with pre-join screen. StudioPage shows 3 booking type buttons (Beratung/Tattoo/Videoberatung) for studios with video_consultation_enabled=true.
